headline: UBER Stock Drops After Waymo Robotaxis Reportedly Disappear From Phoenix App
summary: Waymo’s autonomous vehicles are no longer available on Uber’s app in the Phoenix area, ending a nearly three-year pilot partnership that launched in late 2023, TechCrunch reported on Monday.

headline: Tesla Jumps 8%, Rivian and Lucid Rise 7% as EV Stocks Ride a Tech Rebound
summary: Electric vehicle stocks are surging in midday trading on Monday as a broad tech rebound lifts high-beta names across the market. Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) stock is up 8% to $409.29, leading the group with a company-specific catalyst layered on top of the sector bounce. headline: Gaming ETF Becomes Growth Fund; Trailing Dividend Payout No Longer Reflects New Holdings
